old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-3x8b","title":"EDHOC responder: CBOR encoding errors not checked in context building","description":"CORRECTNESS: Context encoding for MAC_2 and MAC_3 in responder ignores CBOR encoding errors.

This is the responder-side equivalent of project-LICHEN-g45h (which covers initiator only).

Locations in edhoc.c:
- Lines 939-944: context_2 encoding for MAC_2 - no error checks
- Lines 1120-1124: context_3 encoding for MAC_3 - no error checks

Code (responder_process_msg1 context_2):
```c
ZCBOR_STATE_E(zse_ctx2, 0, context_2, sizeof(context_2), 0);
zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse_ctx2, ctx->c_r, ctx->c_r_len);    // unchecked
zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse_ctx2, ctx->ed_pubkey, 32);        // unchecked
zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse_ctx2, ctx->th_2, 32);             // unchecked
zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse_ctx2, ctx->ed_pubkey, 32);        // unchecked
```

If buffer overflow occurs, context_2_len will be computed from corrupted state, leading to incorrect MAC computation and potential security issues.

Fix: Check return values of all zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr calls and return error on failure.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T17:21:10.216587Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T17:21:10.216619Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-3x8b","title":"EDHOC responder: CBOR encoding errors not checked in context building","description":"CORRECTNESS: Context encoding for MAC_2 and MAC_3 in responder ignores CBOR encoding errors.

This is the responder-side equivalent of project-LICHEN-g45h (which covers initiator only).

- Lines 1120-1124: context_3 encoding for MAC_3 - no error checks

Code (responder_process_msg1 context_2):
```c

zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse_ctx2, ctx->c_r, ctx->c_r_len);    // unchecked
zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse_ctx2, ctx->ed_pubkey, 32);        // unchecked
zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse_ctx2, ctx->th_2, 32);             // unchecked
zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse_ctx2, ctx->ed_pubkey, 32);        // unchecked
```

If buffer overflow occurs, context_2_len will be computed from corrupted state, leading to incorrect MAC computation and potential security issues.

Fix: Check return values of all zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr calls and return error on failure.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T17:21:10.216587Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:09:18.113780472Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:09:18.113780472Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:14:18.113780472Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:09:18.113780472Z"}
new_value: {"notes":"Commit: 13be78de1 - fixed related A_3 external_aad in edhoc.c for RFC compliance (CBOR checks already present)"}
Fixed related RFC compliance issue in A_3 construction; CBOR return checks were already present in current code
